buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && mkdir -p ../src/bsm_frontend/static/app && cp -r ../src/bsm_frontend/static/assets ../src/bsm_frontend/static/css ../src/bsm_frontend/static/image ../src/bsm_frontend/static/index.html ../src/bsm_frontend/static/site.webmanifest ../src/bsm_frontend/static/vite.svg ../src/bsm_frontend/static/app/ 2>/dev/null || true
